body: Amara, following up on what we discussed over coffee last week — I've been thinking more about the [Verdant Grid](startups/verdant-grid) situation, and I want to make sure we're aligned before anything gets formalized. My notes from the call with their team show the seed round closing at $4.2M, with our combined allocation sitting at roughly 8% on a post-money basis, but I'd double-check that against whatever you have because things moved fast toward the end. I know you had a separate conversation with Marcus after I dropped off, so it's possible the cap table shifted slightly. Either way, I think the opportunity is still compelling and worth coordinating on — their grid-balancing stack is exactly the kind of infrastructure play I know you've been circling. Let me know when you have twenty minutes this week; happy to defer to your read given how deep you've been in the climate infra space lately.
